meaning: adj.下流的,卑鄙的,无礼的n.[医]坏血病
examples: Not eating enough of vitamins can result in problems such as scurvy, dermatitis or dry, scaly skin.
You might get scurvy, like a pirate.
Those fearing scurvy might add some chopped parsley too.
Weak from scurvy and rheumatism, Sneden scratched away in his shorthand diary, obsessively documenting everything he witnessed.
Everyone got the lemons to cure scurvy but we got another plague in return.
